structuredPlan.goal: Create a Slot Architecture analyzer dimension that scores component slot documentation, default slots, and slot-property coherence as a dedicated 100-point dimension with weight 5.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Default slot presence and documentation scores correctly (up to 25 points: 15 for presence, 10 for description)
Named slot documentation scored proportionally (up to 30 points) based on documented slots / total named slots
Slot type constraints detected and scored (up to 20 points) from @slot JSDoc annotations and descriptions
Slot-property coherence pairs identified and scored (up to 25 points) for matching documentation between slots and properties
Analyzer returns null for components with no slots (presentational/leaf components) rather than zero score
Slot Architecture registered as dimension 13 in dimensions configuration with weight 5 and tier 'important'
Analyzer wired into scoreComponentMultiDimensional() function in health.ts with proper integration
Test suite uses real CEM fixtures from helix (hx-card, hx-dialog, hx-drawer), Spectrum, and Material components
All existing tests pass after integration of slot architecture dimension

tasks.title: Create slot-architecture.ts analyzer with core framework
tasks.description: Create packages/core/src/handlers/analyzers/slot-architecture.ts with export for analyzeSlotArchitecture function. Define interfaces for SlotArchitectureScore, SlotAnalysis, and CoherencePair. Implement logic to return null for slot-less components and calculated scores for components with slots.

tasks.title: Implement default slot scoring (0-25 points)
tasks.description: Extract default slot from CEM definition. Award 15 points if default slot declared, additional 10 points if it has description. Return proportional score for components with default slots.

tasks.title: Implement named slot documentation scoring (0-30 points)
tasks.description: Identify all named slots in CEM. Calculate score as (slots_with_descriptions / total_named_slots) * 30. Award full 30 points only if all named slots are documented.

tasks.title: Implement slot type constraints scoring (0-20 points)
tasks.description: Detect slot type constraints by parsing @slot JSDoc annotations and description fields for element type mentions. Calculate score as (slots_with_type_info / total_slots) * 20. Award points proportional to documented type constraints.

tasks.title: Implement slot-property coherence scoring (0-25 points)
tasks.description: Cross-reference slots against component properties. Identify coherence pairs (e.g., slot='label' + property.label). Check if both are documented and relationship explained. Common patterns: label, icon, header, footer, prefix, suffix. Score as (coherent_pairs / total_pairs) * 25.

tasks.title: Register Slot Architecture as dimension 13
tasks.description: Add new dimension entry to packages/core/src/handlers/dimensions.ts with id 13, name 'slotArchitecture', weight 5, tier 'important', max 100 points, and confidence 'verified'.

tasks.title: Wire analyzer into health.ts scoring function
tasks.description: Import analyzeSlotArchitecture in packages/core/src/handlers/health.ts. Call it within scoreComponentMultiDimensional() for each component. Include result in multi-dimensional score calculation with weight 5. Handle null returns for slot-less components.

tasks.title: Create comprehensive test suite
tasks.description: Create tests/handlers/slot-architecture.test.ts with test cases for: default slot presence/description, named slot documentation coverage, slot type constraints, slot-property coherence pairs, null return for presentational components, and integration with real CEM fixtures.

tasks.title: Add tests with helix component fixtures
tasks.description: Add test cases using real CEM data from helix components (hx-card with slot variations, hx-dialog with header/footer slots, hx-drawer with named slots) to verify analyzer handles rich slot architecture correctly.

tasks.title: Add tests with Spectrum and Material fixtures
tasks.description: Add test cases using Spectrum and Material Design CEM fixtures to validate analyzer on extensive slot usage patterns and type constraints.

tasks.title: Verify integration and all tests pass
tasks.description: Run full test suite to ensure slot architecture analyzer integrates cleanly with existing health scoring, dimensions configuration, and component analysis without breaking any tests.

deviationRules.condition: A component has both a slot and a property with same name but only one is documented
deviationRules.action: Count as partial coherence pair and award 50% of pair points (12.5 for one out of two documented). Document in test comments.

deviationRules.condition: CEM lacks explicit slot definitions but JSDoc @slot annotations exist in description field
deviationRules.action: Parse JSDoc annotations from description text as fallback source for slot detection and type constraint identification.

deviationRules.condition: Component uses context-based slots not captured in CEM slot definitions
deviationRules.action: Return null and document in comments that slot architecture only scores explicit slot definitions per CEM specification.

deviationRules.condition: Test coverage reveals point distribution between categories needs adjustment for better signal
deviationRules.action: Adjust point allocation between default/named/constraints/coherence categories but maintain 100-point total. Document rationale in code comments and update test expectations.

deviationRules.condition: A slot name collides with reserved/lifecycle property names (e.g., 'class', 'ref')
deviationRules.action: Skip coherence pairing for these slots as they don't represent content composition patterns.
